source: Phase 1 code discovery — entity constructors, guard clauses, service layer, EF config, seed data, XML doc comments

rules.rule: Price must be > 0 (entity level) and ≤ 1000 (DTO/API level)
rules.notes: Upper bound of 1000 enforced only at DTO/UI layer, not in the domain entity.

rules.rule: Catalog item name must be unique
rules.notes: Enforced in CreateCatalogItemEndpoint only — not in UpdateCatalogItemEndpoint, not in entity, not as DB UNIQUE index. Race condition possible under concurrent writes. See DQ-04.

rules.rule: Basket item quantity must be ≥ 0 and ≤ int.MaxValue
rules.evidence: Guard.Against.OutOfRange(quantity, 0, int.MaxValue) in SetQuantity() and AddQuantity()
rules.notes: Zero is a valid value. Basket.RemoveEmptyItems() clears all zero-quantity items. No max quantity per item other than int.MaxValue.

rules.rule: Basket must not be empty at checkout
rules.evidence: Guard.Against.EmptyBasketOnCheckout(basket.Items) — throws EmptyBasketOnCheckoutException if basket.Items has 0 items
rules.notes: Web MVC CheckoutModel.OnPost redirects to /Basket/Index if EmptyBasketOnCheckoutException is caught.

rules.rule: Order total uses the price locked when the item was added to the basket, not the current catalog price
rules.evidence: new OrderItem(itemOrdered, basketItem.UnitPrice, basketItem.Quantity) — uses BasketItem.UnitPrice, NOT current CatalogItem.Price
rules.notes: Price changes to a catalog item after it is added to a basket do not affect the order total. No staleness notification shown to user.

rules.rule: Order items store a snapshot of product data at purchase time — catalog changes do not retroactively alter order history
rules.evidence: XML doc comment: 'Represents a snapshot of the item that was ordered. If catalog item details change, details of the item that was part of a completed order should not change.'
rules.notes: Explicitly documented design intent in entity XML comment.

rules.rule: Anonymous users get a basket identified by a GUID cookie; on login the anonymous basket is merged into the authenticated user basket and the anonymous basket is deleted
rules.evidence: TransferBasketAsync: loads anonymous basket by GUID, loads/creates user basket, copies all items, UpdateAsync(userBasket), DeleteAsync(anonymousBasket)
rules.notes: GUID cookie has 10-year TTL. Transfer is non-atomic (2 separate SaveChanges — see DQ-07).

rules.rule: Web MVC catalog view data is cached with 30-second sliding expiration per server instance
rules.notes: In-process IMemoryCache — not shared across instances. Admin edits via PublicApi/BlazorAdmin will not appear in Web MVC storefront for up to 30 seconds.

rules.rule: BlazorAdmin caches catalog data in browser LocalStorage for 1 minute (absolute TTL)
rules.notes: CatalogItem write operations (Create/Edit/Delete) explicitly clear and refresh the LocalStorage 'items' cache via RefreshLocalStorageList(). Brand and Type lists are NOT refreshed on item write — only 1-min TTL refreshes them. Both caches are cleared on BlazorAdmin startup.

rules.rule: BlazorAdmin caches authenticated user state for 60 seconds
rules.evidence: UserCacheRefreshInterval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(60); TODO comment: 'Get Default Cache Duration from Config'
rules.notes: Hardcoded. If a user's role is revoked, they will continue to appear authenticated in BlazorAdmin for up to 60 seconds. The TODO indicates this was intended to be configurable.

rules.rule: Creating, updating, and deleting catalog items requires the 'Administrators' role with a valid JWT Bearer token
Web MVC /Admin pages require the 'Administrators' role (cookie auth)
CatalogItemId in an order item must be ≥ 1
Product image must be JPG/PNG/GIF/JPEG and must not exceed 512 KB
rules.evidence: IsValidImage(): checks base64 decoded length vs ImageMaximumBytes (512000) and extension whitelist
rules.notes: Image upload is currently disabled — this rule applies if re-enabled.

rules.rule: PictureUri stored in DB contains a placeholder host ('http://catalogbaseurltobereplaced') that is substituted at read time with the configured CatalogBaseUrl
rules.notes: Raw DB value is non-functional. If CatalogBaseUrl config is missing, the placeholder URL is returned to clients.

rules.rule: CatalogBrandId and CatalogTypeId must be non-zero when updating
rules.evidence: Guard.Against.Zero(catalogBrandId) in UpdateBrand(); Guard.Against.Zero(catalogTypeId) in UpdateType()

rules.rule: When UseOnlyInMemoryDatabase=true, both databases use in-memory providers and all data is lost on restart
rules.notes: Enables development/testing without a running SQL Server instance.

rules.rule: ALL automated tests run exclusively against in-memory databases — never against SQL Server
rules.evidence: WebTestFixture: UseInMemoryDatabase('InMemoryDbForTesting') + UseInMemoryDatabase('Identity'). ApiTestFixture: UseInMemoryDatabase('DbForPublicApi') + UseInMemoryDatabase('IdentityDbForPublicApi'). IntegrationTests: UseInMemoryDatabase('TestCatalog').
rules.notes: EF In-Memory provider does NOT enforce FK constraints, UNIQUE constraints, or HiLo sequence behaviour. All DQ issues (DQ-01 RESTRICT, DQ-02 no FK, DQ-04 no UNIQUE index, DQ-06 nullable OrderId) are invisible to the test suite. QUALIFIER (RC-01): PublicApiIntegrationTests (MSTest, tests/PublicApiIntegrationTests/) uses WebApplicationFactory<Program> WITHOUT overriding DbContext. Since no appsettings.Testing.json exists for PublicApi and UseOnlyInMemoryDatabase is not set, this suite may attempt localdb connection. All other three suites (UnitTests/xUnit, IntegrationTests/xUnit, FunctionalTests/xUnit) are confirmed in-memory.

rules.rule: When an item already in the basket is added again, the UnitPrice is NOT updated — the original add-time price is always preserved
rules.evidence: Test KeepsOriginalUnitPriceIfMoreItemsAdded: basket.AddItem(id, price); basket.AddItem(id, price*2); Assert item.UnitPrice == price (original). Quantity accumulates but price does not update.
rules.notes: Complements BR-05. The price lock applies not just at checkout but at first-add time within the basket session. A shopper who sees a price drop after adding cannot benefit from it unless they remove and re-add the item.

review_changes.what: Added qualifier: PublicApiIntegrationTests (MSTest) uses WebApplicationFactory<Program> without DB override, unlike the three xUnit suites. May require localdb. The blanket claim 'ALL tests use in-memory' is not strictly accurate for that project.
review_changes.evidence_detail: tests/PublicApiIntegrationTests/ProgramTest.cs:10 — new WebApplicationFactory<Program>() with no ConfigureServices override. src/PublicApi/appsettings.json — no UseOnlyInMemoryDatabase key. Contrast with FunctionalTests/ApiTestFixture.cs which explicitly overrides.

review_changes.what: Added confirmed merge behavior: when the same CatalogItemId exists in both anonymous and user baskets during transfer, quantities are accumulated (AddItem calls AddQuantity). Test proves: anon has item 1 qty=1, user has item 1 qty=4; after transfer user has item 1 qty=5.
NEW rule: basket item UnitPrice is locked at first-add time and never updated even if the same item is re-added with a different price.
